programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Las dudas que surgen por los amantes que ha tenido Natalia empiezan a despertar las verdades del pasado en Lorenzo. Aurora invita a cenar a Martín y a Lorenzo al mismo tiempo. Padre e hijo discuten y ella aprovecha para aclararles sus sentimientos.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora lleva a Lorenzo a su alcoba y se viste como hace veinte años. Ella planea finalmente separarlo de Natalia y, para ello, usará un juego seductor pero peligroso. A Martín se le cierran las puertas de todas las clínicas donde pide trabajo.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends continue to search for DIO's mansion in Cairo. Following Avdol's advice, they have a beggar look for the mansion and wait. Meanwhile, Iggy, wandering the city alone, is confronted by two large dogs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 2
programme.desc: Iggy ends up in a battle to the death in the sewers against Pet Shop, the falcon that guards DIO's mansion. Despite being injured, Iggy runs to the river in an attempt to escape, but he may have underestimated Pet Shop's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 1
programme.desc: Though purchased dearly with Iggy's injury, Jotaro and his group finally have the location of DIO's palace. Waiting for them where they find the butler, Darby Younger, brother of the gambler they previously defeated.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Player, Part 2
programme.desc: The battle for souls with D'Arby continues. Kakyoin challenges D'Arby to a racing game but ends up losing both the race and his soul. Before Joseph really has time to react, Jotaro picks the next game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 1
programme.desc: The baseball game with D'Arby continues within DIO's mansion. For some reason, Jotaro starts telling D'Arby what pitches he'll be throwing. D'Arby finds Jotaro's actions strange, but still believes he has the upper hand because of his Stand's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 2
programme.desc: After a long, hard journey, the group is suddenly faced with saying goodbye to a friend. Polnareff can't control his emotions and starts brandishing his sword toward an unseen enemy with very little success.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Miasma of the Void, Cool Ice, Part 3
programme.desc: Polnareff is pushed to his limits by Cool Ice's merciless attacks. As he awaits death, the dying Iggy manages to save him at the last minute. Polnareff then stabs Cool Ice in the head. Despite showing resilience to the attacks so far.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 1
programme.desc: Polnareff finally comes face-to-face with DIO. Despite Polnareff's hostility, DIO offers to forgive him and allow the Frenchman to join his side again. Polnareff refuses, but for some reason, he cannot get any closer to DIO.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 2
programme.desc: As night falls, the battle expands to encompass the whole city of Cairo. Amidst the melee, Kakyoin says he has a way to figure out DIO's Stand ability.

programme.title: Cyber City Oedo 808
programme.desc: A mysterious hacker has taken over an AI-controlled office building and turned its security systems against the people inside. Sengoku is forced to try and save the hostages and find the hacker - or die trying.

programme.title: Cyber City Oedo 808
programme.desc: Gogul tries to help his old flame and former partner in crime outsmart the military's ultimate killing machine. Can he face death incarnate and survive? Can she? Find out in this exciting episode.

programme.desc: Geneticists around the city are dying from what looks like vampire bites. The case falls to pretty-boy Benten. Soon, Benten finds out all three victims had something in common far more sinister than death by bloodsucker.

programme.title: Black Jack

programme.title: Black Jack

programme.title: Black Jack

programme.desc: Polnareff finally comes face-to-face with DIO. Despite Polnareff's hostility, DIO offers to forgive him and allow the Frenchman to join his side again. Polnareff refuses, but for some reason, he cannot get any closer to DIO.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: DIO's World, Part 2
programme.desc: As night falls, the battle expands to encompass the whole city of Cairo. Amidst the melee, Kakyoin says he has a way to figure out DIO's Stand ability.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Can Ryo survive the Dark Matrix?

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: As battle nears, Talpa closes the gates.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: The warriors make their way through the city, on the way to the enemy's gates.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Loyalties are tested for the warriors.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Anubis is given evil powers ahead of a new battle.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: The Ronin Warriors come face to face with the Ancient One.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Black Jack takes Pinoko to his favorite sushi restaurant. The sushi chef, Taku, after years of training, feels that he is now ready to make the best sushi in Japan for his blind mother. However, he is hit by a truck and loses his arms.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: An old lady is forced to leave her son's hospital where she is living when it becomes full with patients. The son's wife proposes to have her sent to a nursing home, but the son refuses. Pinoko and Sharaku befriend her and offer a place to stay.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Black Jack receives correspondence from overseas regarding a 200-year-old patient suffering from a painful disease. A relative of the patient offers 10 million dollars for successful treatment. Black Jack at first decides not to go, but changes his mind.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Pinoko notices that Largo has fetched a pearl. She shows Black Jack, which surprises him, and he heads out to the shore. Pinoko and Largo follow, and they come across a bay filled with shining pearls. Black Jack tells Pinoko the story of the killer whale.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon bides his time for the perfect opportunity to steal Hisoka's tag.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Kurapika and Leorio are targeted by Hisoka, but they negotiate a truce.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon, Leorio and Kurapika come up with a strategy to take the tag from Ponzu, Leorio's target.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and his friends are surrounded by vipers inside a cave with no way out.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon goes up against Hanzo who easily overpowers him, but Gon refuses to surrender.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon wakes up in the infirmary and finds out he passed the exam.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon decides to go to Kukuroo Mountain to bring Killua back.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Determined to see Killua, Gon and the others say that they are Killua's friends, and ask the guard to relay that message...

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the second leg of their road trip through Scotland, Charlie Ross comes face to face with the penguins of Edinburgh Zoo and Christina Trevanion dares to step onto the top of the iconic Forth Rail Bridge.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Christina Trevanion and Charlie Ross travel through northeast England on the third leg of their road trip. After his last success at auction, Charlie is feeling flush but can Christina catch him up?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in York, Christina Trevanion and Charlie Ross head to auction in Bourne, as Charlie learns of a simple invention that changed British roads forever and Christina hears the story behind the 400-year-old hand of a Catholic Saint.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Christina Trevanion and Charlie Ross begin the final day of their road trip in Spalding, before heading toward Boston. Christina has been closing in on Charlie's lead but who will win as they go head-to-head at the final auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper embark upon the first leg of their brand-new road trip. The experts kick off in Penzance and make their way through scenic Cornwall before going head-to-head at an auction in Liskeard.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the second leg of the road trip for antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper. After a disheartening first auction, Margie has a lot of catching up to do. But will her fortunes change as the expert head for an auction in Exeter?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper kick off the third leg of their road trip in Chippenham. Margie learns about the beginnings of modern photography and Paul learns the fascinating history of Farleigh Hungerford Castle.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: After a very successful auction, antique experts Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper kick off leg four of their road trip in South Wales and make their way across the country for a penultimate auction showdown in Llandeilo.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Margie Cooper begin the last day of their trip together in Newport, South Wales before heading to Newent. Paul is in the lead, but Margie is snapping at his heels. Who will win as they go head-to-head at the final auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the beginning of a new road trip with Thomas Plant and Anita Manning. The experts are touring the country in a yellow Lotus and their first leg sees them start in Hertfordshire and work their way towards an auction in Banbury.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On day two of their trip, Thomas Plant and Anita Manning travel around the southwest of England. Thomas learns about one of the UK's great inventing families, and Anita finds out how a mistake on a map resulted in the naming of America.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Thomas Plant and Anita Manning are embarking on the third leg of their road trip. Thomas is leading the charge after his success in the last auction, but can Anita catch him up?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in South Somerset, Thomas Plant and Anita Manning head towards auction in Wimborne, Dorset. Anita learns about a prehistoric man at Cheddar Gorge and Thomas hears about one man's pioneering fight to forecast the weather.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Thomas Plant and Anita Manning begin the final day of their road trip in the seaside town of Brighton. Anita has taken the lead with just one auction to go. Does Thomas have what it takes to claw his was back to victory?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents in the gardens of Sudeley Castle, Gloucestershire, where the experts look over a fine regulator clock, a sapphire pendant, Winchcombe pottery, and a pouch traded with a dentist by Cligatac Indians in exchange for pulling teeth.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts travel to Lake Bala, in north Wales, where they see a pair of books inscribed to a local by Queen Victoria, an unusual collection of tie pins, and a portrait by Charles Spencelayh.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: In Trent, the team finds a jeweled elephant, a patch box in memory of Lord Nelson, an inlaid table from Goa, and a Victorian suit of armor for jousting. Best of all is a Crimea medal awarded to a man who took part in the Light Brigade's Charge.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: A Chinese vase brought to the Roadshow on a skateboard, an Italian dining chair, a French cabinet brought from the Caribbean on a banana boat, and a large Buddha clad in gold leaf - an international mix when the team visits Redruth in Cornwall.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Round-the-world yachtsman Sir Robin Knox-Johnson guides Michael Aspel around the National Maritime Museum in Falmouth, Cornwall, where finds include a Liberty belt buckle, a 16th-century drug jar, and an intriguing gramophone record.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: A set of musical drinking glasses, a pianist's finger stretcher, and Harry Lauder's piano give this edition a musical flavor. The team also finds rare local silver, a valuable doll, and a collection of drawings by Beatrix Potter worth a small fortune.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the team visit Cressing Temple Barns in Essex. Among the rare finds are a collection of ventriloquists dummies, an Italian chair by Bugatti, a watercolor by Russell Flint, and a Chippendale table.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel's team of experts assess an original manuscript by 19thcentury adventure writer RM Ballantyne and continental furniture and glass, a rare mustard spoon, and a silver picnic set. Plus a trip to Chichester Cathedral.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel's team of experts visit Kendal in the Lake District and assess a gilt table, an inscribed first edition of Beatrix Potter's Pigling Bland, Russian silver, and a quality clock rescued from a skip and brought to the show in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel's team of experts assess antiques in the gardens of Dyrham Park, near Bath. They look over a huge blunderbuss, a mustard pot, and valuable Russian jewelry.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel's team of experts return to Dyrham Park to assess a valuable Lowestoft bowl and a pair of Georgian candlesticks. Plus, Lars Tharp provides an insight into the contents of Wiltshire's historic Dyrham Park.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents an edition from Boston, Lincolnshire. Interesting finds include a dining table valued at £25,000 formerly used for table tennis, a Chinese fertility figure rescued from a shipwreck, and a baseball from the 1936 Olympics.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon travels to Oakland, California, to help Marshawn Lynch turn around his bar, Rob Ben's, by teaching the NFL star to treat his staff less like family and more like a team.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon, joined by rapper T-Pain, is in Sacramento, California, to convince Kings fan Chris he needs to change his sports bar concept if he's ever going to make money.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to the Silver Dollar in Chula Vista, California, where the unresolved tensions between the father and son owners have led to operational issues and neglect.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon does reconnaissance at Kalaveraz Cocina-Cantina in Escondido, California, and finds an owner so in over his head that he's resorted to not paying his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Pepe's Mexican Restaurant & Cantina in Canyon Lake, California, to help a once-bustling bar that's now a ghost town and open the disconnected owners' eyes.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon goes to Orange County, California, and attempts to revitalize Pineapple Hill Grill, a neighborhood bar whose owner's hands-off approach puts patrons at risk.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon drops in on the lively Bottoms Up Bar and Grill in Stanton, California, to teach the owner's son how to manage a rowdy atmosphere while still keeping patrons happy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Phoenix to help the owner of The Armadillo Grill get her business back in order as she desperately tries to pay back her father, but faces $450,000 of debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon attempts to save the legendary Las Vegas speakeasy Capo's Restaurant and bring it back to its pre-pandemic glory.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his hometown of Las Vegas, Jon rescues a beloved party bar that blames their downfall on the pandemic until Jon discovers the truth.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After running a successful floral business for two decades, owner Randi thought she could parlay that success into a budding new bar. Unfortunately, she never rose to the occasion.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his second-ever re-rescue, Jon Taffer returns to Champagne's Cafe to help the struggling bar survive the pandemic and maintain its Las Vegas legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer must save an ambitious but rookie family-run brewery that was forced to open during the pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: For his 200th rescue, Jon rescues a family who bought a Mexican restaurant at the height of the pandemic and put their daughter's future on the line to chase the bright lights of Vegas.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch learns that a cache of US Marine weapons has been stolen and probably hidden offshore. Mitch and Cody locate a sunken vessel with the arms on board, but before they can confiscate them, they are taken captive.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After breaking up with Manny, April finds romance with Craig, who is having a mid-life crisis. While working together to catch a trio of wild men on waverunners harassing swimmers, Craig and April's passion heats up.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch uses Hobie to initiate a relationship with Hobie's horseback riding instructor. Cody, JD, and Lani try to make extra cash in a scheme to collect Sea Urchins, but when another diver gets into trouble, Lani puts her life at risk to save him.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Garner enlists Mitch’s help to track down and capture a ring of drug smugglers operating from a boat offshore. The stakes get deadly when Neely goes undercover to plant a bug and her cover is blown! Lani struggles to come to terms with her deafness.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody makes a crazy bet with some local hotshots. Mitch risks his uncle's new Scarab in a wild race. Meanwhile, Neely and her baby daughter Ashley move in with Mitch for a couple of days sparking a twist to their relationship.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After a swimmer shows symptoms of a deadly virus, headquarters is quarantined, trapping Mitch, April, Donna, and JD inside with an annoying salesman. With JD waylaid, Newman takes on his plum assignment overseeing a photoshoot of sexy models.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After he saves Neely's new nanny from a boating disaster, she develops a lethal attraction to Mitch. April and Manny join a charity contest arranged by Newmie for his juvenile diabetic nephew.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While Lani prepares for a photo shoot on a cruise to Alaska, Neely travels to see her ex-husband who lives in Juneau. Hobie's good fortune lands him, Mitch and Cody on the cruise ship to Alaska as well, but danger lurks onboard.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and Cody surprise Neely and Lani by showing up on the Dawn Princess. During the stop in Juneau, Gavin finally recognizes Leslie, who takes a clueless Hobie with her at the beginning of a harrowing chase…

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After an escalating, heart-stopping chase across a glacier, Mitch rescues Hobie and Leslie from hitman Gavin. Mitch returns to the Dawn Princess with a romantic proposal for Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch's marriage to Neely falls apart when her ex-husband arrives at Baywatch and they learn the truth about their cruise ship wedding. Cody and April fly to New York, but a frantic rescue effort ensues when their plane crashes during take-off.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch struggles with Neely's lies and the truth about their shipboard wedding. Cody and April race to save survivors of their plane crash. A tragic turn of events puts April in mortal danger when half the plane's fuselage sinks beneath the Pacific.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Captain Alexis "Alex" Ryker, the conniving CEO of a private lifeguard company, wants to take over Baywatch to expand her private lifeguarding empire. Mitch suspects Alex of setting up fake rescues and recruits Cody to spy on the BayGuard team.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody accompanies Alex on a vacation to Hawaii where she wants to take her autistic 10-year-old nephew, Timmy, to swim with a dolphin in the local lagoon. Cody spends quality time with Lani's sister, Callie, a local Hawaiian lifeguard.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Undefeated Welterweight Ukrainian champ Yaroslav Amosov puts his belt on the line against Jamaican Jason Jackson.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Hollywood, Florida with an explosive night of fights. Champion Eddie Alvarez defends his belt against Lightweight Tournament Winner Michael Chandler in one of Bellator MMA's most epic fights.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Irvine with two belts on the line! First Pat Curren defends his Featherweight belt against Patricio 'Pitbull' Freire. Then in the main event, Michael Chandler takes on Rick Hawn for the Lightweight World Championship.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville, Oklahoma as Ben Askren defends his Welterweight belt against Season 7 tournament winner Karl Amoussou. Plus the Bellator MMA debut of King Mo fighting in his home state.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Atlantic City, NJ with the Featherweight Championship belt on the line! Champion Pat Curran defends his title against Season 8 Featherweight tournament winner Shahbulat Shamhalaev.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Rio Rancho, NM. Welterweight Champion Ben Askren takes on Welterweight season 8 tournament winner Andrey Koreskov. Then Michael Chandler defends his Lightweight belt against the Lightweight season 8 tournament winner David Rickels.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Michael Chandler once again goes up against Eddie Alvarez in a rematch for the Lightweight title. Also, Pat Curran defends his Featherweight belt against Daniel Straus and King Mo takes on Emanuel Newton for the Light Heavyweight title.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Atlantic City, NJ. The Heavyweight belt is on the line as champion Alexander Volkov takes on Vitaly Minakov. Then in the main in the event Quinton 'Rampage' Jackson makes his Bellator MMA debut against Joey Beltran.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in Hammond, Indiana with the Featherweight World Title on the line as Champ Daniel Straus and former Champ Pat Curran meet for a third time to decide who walks away with the title.

programme.title: Bellator 123: Curran vs Pitbull 2
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Mohegan Sun as Pat Curran looks to defend his featherweight belt against bitter rival Patricio Pitbull. Also on the card, WWE superstar Bobby Lashley returns to the cage, along with knockout artists Cheick Kongo and King Mo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Plymouth, Missouri with the Light Heavyweight World Title on the line as Champ Emanuel Newton takes on journeyman Joey Beltran.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Four adult siblings say they've been blacklisted by their mother from seeing their dying father, a claim their mother vehemently denies. Emotions run high when this fractured family comes together on Dr. Phil’s stage. Can they put an end to the fighting?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Natalie, 22, says her boyfriend Justin, 25, has an anger problem, and she fears for her life and for their 10-month-old son. Both admit their child has witnessed turmoil. Does this young relationship have a future?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ashley was sexually abused by her father from ages of 5 to 18, locked in a small camper, while giving birth to four of her father's children. In her first national interview since her father's arrest, the 22-year-old mom speaks about her horrible ordeal.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The conversation heated when Dr. Phil gave self-professed bully Temica RoShawn a reality check about her aggressive behavior. Guests Ross & Lyndy say weeks of bullying culminated in their 15-yr-old son being sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El bien común
programme.desc: El mundo de Danny se sacude cuando Robert Lewis (Michael Imperioli), de la oficina del Fiscal General, obtiene nuevas pruebas en su contra en el caso de tiroteo en defensa propia del asesino en serie Thomas Wilder.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El precio de la justicia
programme.desc: Danny y Báez están decididos a conseguir justicia para una joven traumatizada que fue rehén, a pesar de su resistencia a presentar cargos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las regals de la mafia
programme.desc: Decididos a hacer justicia por el ataque a Gormley, Danny y Frank buscan la ayuda del detective Anthony Abetemarco, quien tiene vínculos con el barrio donde ocurrió el ataque.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la desaparición de un contramaestre de la Marina que es el único testigo en un juicio por asesinato que se avecina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo del NCIS se asocian con un agente del Servicio de Investigación de la Guardia Costera (CGIS) para resolver el asesinato de un marine tiroteado en un barco restaurante.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La sesión de reclutamiento de un suboficial en una feria universitaria tiene un final fatal, lo que lleva al equipo del NCIS, acompañado por el predecesor del Dr. Mallard, a resolver su asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS entra en acción para encontrar al agresor responsable de matar a golpes a un marine en su propio patio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Hotch recibe una llamada telefónica de su hermano Sean, de quien está separado y reside en Nueva York, de quien no ha escuchado nada durante cuatro años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight of the biggest athletes to ever step foot on the ranch battle it out in Possession, Bail Out and The Crate. But only one will survive to take on the Skullbuster for a shot at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight female athletes are put to the test in Possession, Bail Out and The Crate. But only one will take on the Skullbuster for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight male athletes face off in The Summit, Barn Burner and Strapped. The winner moves on to the Skullbuster and a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin begins season four with eight hardcore athletes going head to head in three rounds of grueling competition. The winner will have to beat the returning champion's benchmark time in order to walk away with $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 06/17/2018. W. Kamau Bell heads down south to retrace his family roots and debunk some myths.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 06/24/2018. Is Canada truly a tolerant racism-free multicultural utopia? A trip up north reveals some truths.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 07/01/2018. Hawaii isn’t just a paradise for tourists – its lands are full of history and culture. Experience its past, present and future from natives.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/02/2013. Bourdain and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, move from hip, modern Lima back in time into pre-Columbian Peru.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/09/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Congo, the setting of one of his favorite books, Conrad’s “Heart of Darkness.”

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/22/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Andalucia during Semana Santa, Holy Week, to visit longtime director Zach Zamboni, who currently lives in Granada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/12/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores the "Interzone,” where artists like Burroughs, Bowles and the Rolling Stones sought escape from Western moral prohibitions.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 04/29/2018. Head to the US-Mexico border to discover what life is like for the people who live there.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 05/06/2018. Unraveling the stereotypes about Sikhism, one of the most understood religions in the US.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/13/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Sicily, where he goes fishing for his supper and sets out to find a home-cooked meal.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/06/2013. Home to chef Rene Redzepi of Noma, Copenhagen is known as the cultural center of Denmark. Anthony Bourdain explores its fantastic food and natural beauty.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/29/2013. With a combination of cultures, New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. Go with Anthony Bourdain as he explores.

programme.title: This Is Life with Lisa Ling

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver tries to escape through an occupied driveway, a man and his dad are found possessing more than just drugs, and five teenagers learn how weed can impact their future.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist leads officers on a high-speed chase, a dead car battery won't stop a man from eluding the police, and a wanted driver fails to avoid an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract interested “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer decides to check out a local bar where a lot of illegal activity takes place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle traveling up to 100mph on a local freeway. An officer is dispatched to a larceny in progress at a local convenience store. A man threatens an elderly woman at their residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues suspects for reckless driving, police respond to the armed robbery of a pizza delivery driver, and a deputy detects a unique scent during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man learns a hard lesson about wearing his seatbelt, and police perform a traffic stop and uncover a sad man with a strange story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over who the narcotics belong to. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: En el tiempo de las mariposas

programme.title: Raging Bull
programme.desc: ¡Robert De Niro gana el Oscar como Mejor Actor caracterizando el papel de Jake La Motta, un boxeador cuyas complejidades psicológicas y sexuales estallan en violencia!

programme.title: Los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Hombres armados son contratados para proteger un pueblo mexicano de un grupo de bandidos en esta adaptación de “Seven Samurai” de Kurosawa.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: Aquí Está Tu Enamorado
programme.desc: Antonio es un apuesto "Don Juan" al que le encantan las mujeres, pero huye del matrimonio como del diablo. Todo se complicará cuando pretende a la novia del comisiario y la llegada de un "paquete" misterioso.

programme.title: Corona de Lagrimas
programme.desc: Refugio trabaja como contadora para poder mantener a sus tres hijos. Sin embargo, la vida de todos da un giro cuando uno de ellos es llevado a la cárcel y tienen que resolver sus propios problemas.

programme.title: El grito de la muerte
programme.desc: Dos amigos se ven involucrados en una aventura al investigar sobre una figura de piedra que fue desenterrada, y a cuyo fantasma de la creadora han visto llorando.

programme.title: Único testigo
programme.desc: Cuando una joven Amish y su hijo se encuentran envueltos en el asesinato de un agente antinarcóticos encubierto, su salvador resulta ser el duro detective de Filadelfia John Book.

programme.title: Días de trueno
programme.desc: Tim Daland descubre a Cole y lo pone en el equipo liderado por el legendario Harry Hogge para ir por la Copa NASCAR en el Daytona 500. Un choque casi acaba con la carrera de Cole y debe recurrir a una hermosa doctora para recuperar el valor.

programme.title: Las mujeres perfectas
programme.desc: Después de mudarse con su familia a la comunidad de Stepford, Connecticut, la ex ejecutiva de un canal de televisión en Nueva York, Joanna Eberhart empieza a darse cuenta de que Stepford es demasiado perfecto.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction: tiempos violentos
programme.desc: El guionista y director Quentin Tarantino presenta a un gran elenco en Pulp Fiction, una entretenida historia de violencia y redención. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman y Bruce Willis protagonizan este fenómeno de la cultura popular.

programme.title: My Left Foot
programme.desc: Este es el brillante retrato del legendario irlandés Christy Brown que, a pesar de la parálisis cerebral, aprendió a usar su única extremidad controlable, su pie izquierdo, para convertirse en un artista y escritor consumado.

programme.title: ¿A quién ama Gilbert Grape?
programme.desc: Ocuparse de Arnie es una tarea que puede ser bastante demandante para Gilbert, al menos mientras trabaja en la tienda local.

programme.title: Verano en Louisiana
programme.desc: La historia de una joven que llega a la mayoría de edad y se enamora de su vecino.

programme.title: Decepcionado
programme.desc: Una entretenida comedia sobre dos viejos amigos, y examantes, cuya reunión sorpresa cambia sus vidas y la de todos los demás en su pequeño pueblo, el cual se encuentra en crisis.

programme.title: En nombre del amor
programme.desc: De Nicholas Sparks, el autor best-seller, llega esta conmovedora historia sobre hasta dónde estamos dispuestos a llegar para mantener viva la esperanza del amor.

programme.title: Todos a bailar
programme.desc: Un chico rebelde de la gran ciudad en un pueblo conservador del medio oeste, donde el baile y cualquier disfrute juvenil han sido prohibidos.

programme.title: Fragmentos de Abril
programme.desc: April Burns es una hija rebelde que se ha ofrecido a realizar una cena de Acción de Gracias para los más desfavorecidos en su apartamento de East Side. Pero sus intentos de crear una fiesta inolvidable fracasan cuando descubre que su horno no funciona.

programme.title: Juegos del corazón
programme.desc: Una pareja de casados que renovarán sus votos, una mujer enfocada en su carrera perseguida por un encantador extraño, y una joven pareja que se conoce en un club de LA. Una comedia romántica sobre parejas modernas que se unen de maneras inesperadas.

programme.title: La ciudad del pecado (Sin City)
programme.desc: En estas historias entrecruzadas, un universo de héroes improbables y reacios, intentan hacer lo correcto en una ciudad a la que ya no le importa nada.

programme.title: Escape de Los Ángeles
programme.desc: El hombre del parche regresó. Llámenlo Serpiente. Su tarea es recorrer Los Ángeles destruido para recuperar un dispositivo letal.

programme.title: El vengador del futuro
programme.desc: Es el año 2084 D.C.y a Doug Quaid lo persiguen sueños recurrentes de un viaje a Marte, el planeta vecino más cercano a la Tierra. Vive en una época que ha sobrevivido otra guerra mundial y donde las elecciones para el gobierno ya no existen.

programme.title: Jóvenes defensores
programme.desc: La III Guerra Mundial se ha llevado a cabo, dejando a un grupo de estudiantes de secundaria como refugiados que deben organizarse gradualmente en un cuerpo guerrillero.

programme.title: Transpecos (LAS)
programme.desc: For three US Border Patrol agents, the contents of one car reveals a dark secret within their unit that could cost them all their lives. SXSW Grand Jury Award Winner 2016

programme.title: La batalla de Los Angeles
programme.desc: En febrero de 1942, las fuerzas estadounidenses atacaron un objeto volador no identificado sobre Los Ángeles. Ahora, casi 70 años después, los invasores extraterrestres han regresado.

programme.title: Contacto sangriento
programme.desc: El maestro de Ninjutsu Frank Dux viaja a Hong Kong para participar en el Kumite, las olimpiadas de artes marciales, y conoce a una hermosa periodista estadounidense. Al poco tiempo deberá enfrentarse a Chong-Li, un despiadado maestro coreano de taekwondo.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: El Norte
programme.desc: Celebremos el 35 aniversario de la nominada al Oscar "El norte" en una exquisita restauración de este clásico sobre inmigrantes guatemaltecos, que huyen de la violencia y buscan una vida mejor en Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Entre las piernas
programme.desc: Un guionista adicto al sexo descubre con horror que sus conversaciones eróticas circulan por Madrid.

programme.title: El lugar donde estuvo el paraíso LAS
programme.desc: En Iquitos, el cónsul de un país sin nombre debe enfrentarse a una doble persecución. Por un lado, la de las autoridades locales en busca de un refugiado político y, por otro, la de los celos incontrolables de su hija Anna.

programme.title: Atlas de geografia humana
programme.desc: Fran, Rosa, Ana y Marisa deben armar un atlas de geografía. Sus vidas predecibles están a punto de cambiar a partir de ahora. Mientras trabajan en el atlas, experimentan el amor, el desamor, la infidelidad y la reconciliación.

programme.title: The Prophecy
programme.desc: El ganador del Óscar Christopher Walken protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural donde las fuerzas del cielo y el infierno luchan por la humanidad. Solo un excura detective y una niña podrán frenar al ángel negro Gabriel (Walken) y salvar el mundo.

programme.title: Viernes 13
programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: Hellraiser III: El infierno en la tierra
programme.desc: La vida de una ambiciosa reportera de televisión cambia para siempre tras ser testigo de la muerte de un adolescente. En su viaje por descubrir la verdad, encuentra una caja de rompecabezas extraña que revela un mundo demoniaco de placer y dolor.

programme.title: Halloween VI: La maldición de Michael Myers
programme.desc: El pueblo de Haddonfield, Illinois, celebra Halloween por primera vez en cinco años, pero el asesino en masa maníaco Michael Myers se une a las festividades, con su némesis, el Dr. Loomis, un empedernido psiquiatra, pisándole los talones.

programme.title: The Prophecy
programme.desc: El ganador del Óscar Christopher Walken protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural donde las fuerzas del cielo y el infierno luchan por la humanidad. Solo un excura detective y una niña podrán frenar al ángel negro Gabriel (Walken) y salvar el mundo.

programme.title: Terrifier (LAS)
programme.desc: Art el payaso regresa y pone su mirada en tres mujeres jóvenes, junto con cualquiera que se meta en su camino.

programme.title: Con el diablo adentro
programme.desc: En 1989, los servicios de emergencia recibieron una llamada al 911 de Maria Rossi confesando tres brutales asesinatos. Los tribunales la hallaron con demencia, pero algo más la encontró primero.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer 3: la hija del verdugo
programme.desc: Al caer la noche, el escritor Ambrose Bierce y otros compañeros de viaje se reúnen en un bar en el desierto de México, en 1914. Será una experiencia difícil de olvidar, ya que el bar está dirigido por un grupo de seres sedientos de sangre.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Un vampiro suelto en Brooklyn
programme.desc: Cuando un barco llega a Brooklyn y todos están muertos, nadie nota que algo desembarca y la matanza continúa en tierra. Un vampiro busca a una mujer, mitad humana, mitad inmortal, mientras una detective investiga las muertes.

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: De mendigo a millonario
programme.desc: La historia de un timador sin hogar que cambia estilos de vida con un inversor adinerado.

programme.title: Las aventuras de Priscilla, reina del desierto
programme.desc: Dos drag queens y un transexual consiguen un espectáculo en medio del desierto.

programme.title: Solteras indisponibles
programme.desc: Tres niñas pequeñas, mejores amigas, conocen a un hechicero que les concede un deseo: tener la misma suerte en el amor. Varios años después, cada una de ellas tiene su propia vida hasta que un día un evento inesperado cambia sus destinos

programme.title: El mundo está loco, loco

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: The Way West
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land baron and his hired gun.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land baron and his hired gun.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer unwittingly signs up a fugitive bank robber as a new recruit.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter suspects Gomer has been spending his Sundays at the beach; then tries to meet the beauties Gomer appeared with in a magazine.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter tries to transfer Gomer to the Marine band.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: A charity rummage sale asks for donated clothing. Being among the wealthier residents of Hooterville, the organizers look to the Douglases. It isn't long before Oliver has to stop Lisa from giving away his entire wardrobe!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Eb is quickly engaged to Loreli Appleby, whom he has only known for a day. Eb tries to impress Loreli's father, a farmer, but in typical fashion, he accidentally ruins his future father-in-law's cabbage crop.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Fire Chief Joe Carson is looking for a way to go to Miami, he hires Oliver as his assistant, hoping Oliver will pay for the trip. The plan backfires, no pun intended, when Oliver starts pointing out what a poor job the chief has been doing.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The highways in Hooterville are in dire need of repair. Oliver is fed up and believes he can make a difference by complaining to his state representative, Ben Hanks. But Hanks' popularity proves greater than his sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa feels like she should be contributing more and wants to start working in Oliver's construction business. Lisa is like a fish out of water as she arrives to the Monroes' workshop in overalls and causes one problem after another.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa plays bovine matchmaker when Oliver and Lisa decide it is time for their female cow, Eleanor, to start providing milk for the farm. Oliver makes arrangements for Eleanor to mooooove in with the neighbor's bull, but Lisa has other ideas.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The townsfolk look forward to 'Old Mail Day', when once a year undelivered mail is handed out. The delayed mail includes a letter all the way from 1917! Oliver is upset by the poor service, but his complaints land with more impact than he intended.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When word spreads that an agricultural student is coming to Hooterville to study with county agent Hank Kimball, no one seems to be interested. However, things change when the folks discover that the student is an attractive blonde.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: This episode tells the unusual tale of Hooterville's founding. As the town prepares for its centennial, Oliver announces a reenactment of the town's origins and casts himself and Lisa in the roles of Horace and Doris Hooter.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When a blue feather arrives in the mail for Lisa, her Hungarian roots tell her that trouble is brewing. The feather is a symbol of malfortune to come, and she suspects it was sent by Hungarian gypsies, a warning that they are out to get her.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Don't count chickens before they hatch! Oliver thinks he's laid a gold egg of an idea when he decides to dive beak first into the business of raising chickens. Lisa, on the other hand, sees little difference between raising chickens and children.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: All that glitters is not frosted cereal. After a jewelry heist in Chicago, the robbers foolishly stash their booty in the grain bin of a cereal manufacturer. Oliver and Lisa discover the jewels in their bowl of Crickly Wickly!

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria has become friends with a girl named Tammy and they have been organizing a Women's Fair. Male chauvinism is put to the test when Gloria poses a riddle to Mike and Archie who are stumped when they can't come up with the answer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Exploring the newfound remains of a dinosaur species considered the biggest carnivore in history, all while posing the question whether they engaged in a fight against the Argentinasaurus.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: For thousands of years, downtown LA hid an indiscriminate killer. In one of the most surprising wildlife crime stories in the world, `Natural World' turns forensic detective to solve the mystery and unmask victims and killers.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: Finding evidence of alien technology in Smythe’s office, the Doctor, Jamie, and Zoe make their escape in Lady Jennifer’s ambulance, but Smythe gives orders to have them killed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that they are on an alien planet divided into different time zones where human soldiers fight never-ending wars.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor and Zoe penetrate the Aliens' HQ from where the war games are controlled. Carstairs is reconditioned and exposes the Doctor and Zoe as German spies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: In the American Civil War zone, Jamie and Lady Jennifer join forces with resistance fighters from various time zones and prepare to launch an attack on Central Control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor, Jamie, and Carstairs have escaped back to the 1917 war zone, but General Smythe is waiting for them and opens fire on them with a machine gun.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the War Chief who belongs to the same race of people as the Doctor and offers an alliance. In the 1917 zone fighters prepare to attack Central Control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The rebels seize control of the Aliens' HQ but the Doctor is forced to send a call for help to his own people, the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: The TARDIS takes the newly regenerated Doctor to Earth to begin his exile. Brigadier Lethbridge-Stewart leads a UNIT investigation into a mysterious meteorite shower.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: A recovered Doctor escapes the hospital and joins UNIT in their investigation. Meanwhile, Channing directs one of his Auton servants to recover a meteorite.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: Sam Seeley has found one of the meteorites but the Autons want it back and are closing in. General Scobie visits Auto Plastics, playing into the hands of Channing.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: UNIT is at a project run by Professor Stahlman who intends to penetrate Earth’s crust. But the drilling has already released something deadly from beneath the Earth’s surface.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: The green slime oozing from the drill head is transforming men into monsters. Stahlman refuses to listen to the warnings and resorts to sabotage so that his project may continue.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: Transported to a parallel world, the Doctor discovers that England is under military rule and the drilling project is at a more advanced stage.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: In the parallel world, the drilling project is about to penetrate the Earth’s crust. The Doctor, arrested as a spy, is unable to convince his captors of the danger that faces them.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: In the parallel world, Earth’s crust has been penetrated, releasing terrible forces from within the Earth. The Doctor must escape back to his world to prevent the same catastrophe.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: As the Earth in the parallel world faces destruction, the Doctor is desperate to return to his world to warn them of the danger. But time is running out.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: The Doctor has escaped the doomed, parallel Earth and has returned to his own world where he attempts to put a halt to the drilling project.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Terror of the Autons
programme.desc: The Master paves the way for an invasion by the insidious Nestene consciousness.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Terror of the Autons
programme.desc: The Master uses his hypnotic powers to take control of a factory where he creates Autons.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Terror of the Autons

programme.title: Doctor Who: Terror of the Autons

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her, bondsman Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"--shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds.? But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today it's the threat of severe thunderstorm, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who?after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identity which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday, but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet. A quick check of his

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors, but instead of hunting for treats, they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie. But Thelma and Louise they ain't.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Leland and Dog make a quick visit to the police supply store to get some new gadgets for the team. But they can't linger because they've also got a fugitive to catch. Their target is reputed to have an explosive temper.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: Tasha sparks a new flame; Ghost utilizes his resources in an attempt to kill Tommy; Tariq's in over his head with the Italians; Dre forms an unlikely alliance; Proctor hatches a plan to gain custody of his daughter.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tasha revisits old habits when she begins to recruit soldiers for her new empire; Tariq pulls a ruse on Vincent; Proctor warns Tommy about a snitch; Ghost plans to take care of the snitch on his own terms.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: After being duped by Tariq, Vincent holds Tariq hostage; Ghost and Tommy call a temporary truce in order to face a common enemy; Tasha puts her differences to the side and turns to an unlikely ally for help.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost and Tasha butt heads on how to raise Tariq; Tate gets caught with his pants down; LaKeisha creates new enemies within Tommy's organization; Jason tasks Ghost and Tommy to work together.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Two ransom notes are delivered when a wealthy businessman is kidnapped.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: A Department of Justice agent is compromised in the press and then vanishes before she can be brought in.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: A serial killer, released from prison, disappears; someone is stalking Antonio.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Jess dreams about people who have disappeared and is teamed with an FBI agent to find a Senator's missing fiancée.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Brooke and Jess investigate the disappearance of an FBI cadet.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Valeria se acerca a Perfecta y a Iluminada con intenciones muy firmes, pero ellas se niegan a escucharla. Alicia y Sebastián se inquietan con los comentarios de Felipe y Duván.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta, Iluminada y Laurentino espían a Sebastián para comprobar lo que les dice Valeria. Alicia no está convencida de la propuesta que él le hace, Justino trata de persuadirla.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia se sorprende con los preparativos de Justino, él hace una invitación especial. Blasina y Querubín están preocupados por la visita de Perfecta, Sebastián toma acciones.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián trata de convencer a Alicia, no se dan cuenta de que los escuchan. Las palabras de Justino conmueven a su protegida por todo lo que él hace por ella, pero su discurso va más allá.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia se enfrenta a Iluminada y a Laurentino para llevarse a los niños, ella se siente culpable mientras espera noticias de Perfecta, quien es trasladada al hospital después del incidente.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Dimas le dice a Sebastián que Perfecta no reacciona, pero ella recibe una visita inesperada. Alicia le asegura a Justino que se siente fuerte y no le importa lo que piense la gente del pueblo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia y Sebastián sienten un gran alivio por la recuperación de Perfecta, pero Justino les advierte lo que puede pasar. Laurentino piensa que puede proseguir con sus planes a pesar de todo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián está intranquilo por la actitud que pueda tomar Hayde, está seguro de que Laurentino e Iluminada la envenenan en su contra. Dimas trata de aconsejar a Perfecta.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta recibe a Hayde en el hospital para hablarle de Sebastián y Alicia, trata de ponerla de su lado, le hace una importante petición y quiere probar su lealtad. Dimas prohíbe las visitas.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián habla con su madre, Perfecta le dice que ya cuenta con quien va a poner todo en su lugar. Alicia no acepta las noticias que trae Sebastián, pero Justino les indica lo que deben hacer.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia se desmorona al tener una discusión con Hayde delante de los niños y Justino. Sebastián está dispuesto a todo por lo que siente, una visita a la finca puede cambiar las circunstancias.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia y Sebastián se tratan con naturalidad cuando coinciden con Dimas y Hayde. Los niños presienten los sentimientos de un hombre misterioso que observa a su madre y a su tío.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Una noticia terrible angustia a todos, el teniente Ríos inicia un interrogatorio en la finca. Alicia está alterada, defiende con todas sus fuerzas su derecho de permanecer al lado de Sebastián.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Hayde logra detener un fuerte altercado y fija posición frente a Alicia. Dimas se esfuerza al tratar de evitar que Perfecta se entere de la situación que atraviesa Sebastián.
