programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: A man tells police he shot an intruder who had attacked and murdered his wife. The husband paints a tragic picture and is dubbed a hero. Four years later, forensic evidence leads police to re-examine the motives of this so-called hero.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Two men are murdered while sleeping in their beds. The next night, arson destroys a family planning clinic. Investigators wonder whether some shards of glass, paint chips and a chicken feather could link what appear to be two separate crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old girl disappears from a remote Alaska town, investigators wonder if she has been attacked by a bear or become lost in the dense woods. Eventually, they realize that neither assumption is true.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just weeks before a witness is to testify against the man accused of sexually assaulting her, she is murdered in the front yard of her own home. Investigators immediately suspect her attacker, but they don't have enough evidence to prove his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspicious fire sweeps through an apartment, killing two young women. The cause of the fire and the identity of the victims are unclear, but a closer look at the scene reveals something hidden in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No one in a quiet residential community saw anything unusual the day one of their neighbors was brutally attacked and murdered. Fingerprints found at the crime scene and surveillance video helped investigators to apprehend the presumed killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mysterious computer crash pushed a thriving manufacturing company to the brink of collapse, jeopardizing hundreds of employees' jobs. Forensic investigators must determine if the crash was the result of a computer defect, human error or sabotage.

programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay pide un voluntario para cambiar de bando. La dinámica del grupo cambia a medida que los equipos enfrentan su próximo desafío: crear cuatro platos con veinte ingredientes específicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los últimos cuatro participantes preparan un almuerzo para los invitados sorpresa: ochenta delicadas madres embarazadas. El Chef que tenga el plato preferido gana un boleto de compras de $1,000. Mientras los demás deben limpiar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Dieciséis Chefs profesionales compiten por un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City. Los participantes deben sorprender al Chef Ramsay con sus platos originales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninjas are suspicious when their arch enemy Lord Garmadon moves in to help searching for his missing son Lloyd

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines’ inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd’s rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas’ lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty – the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly’s Boarding School, they discover it’s a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon’s new Mega-Weapon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth’s Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn’t have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly’s Boarding School, they discover it’s a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon’s new Mega-Weapon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth’s Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn’t have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock’ and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: They Gather for the Feast
programme.desc: After earning invitations to the Tournament of Sources, the Ninja attend a banquet for Elemental Masters with friendly faces and old enemies, and Lloyd confronts a familiar face from his vision.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Inside the Maze
programme.desc: Arin continues his investigation into the missing Horns but makes time for Frak, who Sora suspects is working for Ras and Nya's first match pits her against Jay, still with no memory of their past.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: United We Fall
programme.desc: In her match against Cinder, Wyldfyre's temper proves a liability in and out of the arena, and in order to stay in the Tournament, the Ninja invoke an ancient rule that requires them to compete in a race outside of Temple City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: Arin grapples with Ras's accusation that Master Wu caused the Merge while the Ninja complete the Temple Race and win their way back into the Tournament.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Sword Shatters
programme.desc: Arin follows a lead in his investigation of the missing horns to the Temple City Museum; a tour from Roby reveals a deeper connection between the Tournament and Source Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Clues and Suspects
programme.desc: Roby and Bleckt visit an injured Lloyd to complete the transfer of Zeatrix's powers as Arin links Bleckt to a clue in his investigation and follows him back to a secret office, where Wyldfyre has an idea to uncover his plans.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin scopes a jewelry museum where the billion-dollar gem Cleopatra's Tear is displayed. But Lupin can't get to it because the display case is secured by high-voltage electricity.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: No thief has ever succeeded in stealing the secret gem of Pompeii's nunnery; it's guarded by venomous snakes. Even Arsene Lupin gave up on it, since he hates snakes. But Lupin takes on the challenge. Will Lupin succeed? And what kind of secret gem is it?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though the tycoon Steel had replaced all his bodily organs with artificial organs to live, he's told that he only has a week to live. There is only one way he could prolong his life, which is to receive a brain transplant and he wants Lupin's Brain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Famous gourmand and field mice scientist Salmon Whitney is also known as being the chairman of a Canadian diamond mining operation. Lupin is after his diamonds, which will go on auction in Paris.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Coaxed by Fujiko, Lupin decides to steal the diamond chandelier at the Kremlin Palace. He disguises himself as Zenigata and infiltrates the palace, but government police soldier Natasha captures him and throws him in the slammer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: England's Lord Weather provokes Lupin with a bet, and dares him to steal Red Arrow away from him. Lupin takes the challenge as it's a matter of pride, but Jigen wants no part of it because he and Weather are gambling buddies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Miami Bank is on the verge of bankruptcy after its last customers closed their accounts. The bank manager Garlic devises a plan to revive the bank, and drums up news that his bank had been raided by Lupin; he also asks Lupin to really do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Thief brothers Nanja-Monja have been in the business since the days of Arsène Lupin; they decide to induct Lupin as a tourist attraction for the Republic of Karchina. But first they abduct Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko joins Lupin and gang who are camping and cooking Sukiyaki; people are hunting Fujiko, and gunfire is exchanged. Fujiko gets captured and Lupin's Sukiyaki meal gets ruined, but he finds an atomic bomb's detonator plug inside of the Sukiyaki bowl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Genius prodigy boy Romanoff has ten doctorates from Russia's Public Academy; blustering that no greater than he exists, he challenges Lupin. Since Fujiko is involved, Lupin cannot back down; what will become of this challenge?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko is the model for Norway's famous sculptor Vingel's crystal mermaid statue; she believed when he said he would give it to her the day it was finished, but Vingel gets greedy and sells it to the mayor of the city of Bergen instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin tries to steal a bunch of diamonds from a diamond auction. But the auction auditorium is at the Marine Tower above a skyscraper, and there is only one transparent elevator to get there.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin heads to Mecca to steal Mohammed's treasure. But first he is confronted by Patra Lawrence, the grandaughter of the Lawrence of Arabia, who is the chief of Mecca's special police headquarters; how will Lupin steal the treasure now?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Fujiko instigates Lupin and friends to go steal; this time their target is the Jovich Piano installed in a music hall built around it. There is no door large enough in the hall to carry the piano out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the shipment of raw diamonds that arrived at a harbor in Nice; he sneaks into the storage in the middle of the night but Zenigata was on to him. Lupin escapes with the help of Jigen and Goemon, but Fujiko gets captured.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A month ago, president Gappolini of one of the world's top five trading companies, had died. Gappolini bequeathed a will saying that the heir to the company presidency will be the world's finest sharpshooter and Jigen is a target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's said that immense sums of money confiscated from organized crime get transported to a Swiss bank by ICPO, once a year. Naturally, Lupin wants a piece of that action, so he steals the armed security vehicle along with Zenigata in it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The city of Grand Hexagon lies at the border of France and Spain; the city is designed with six sides. But at the center of the city is Raika Bank storing fifty tons of gold bullion; an alarm will go off if even one bullion is missing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Robot soldier Lamda flies above the sky of Tokyo, raids a jewelry store. Its creator, professor Oyamada's daughter Maki and Lupin say that it was just a show to demonstrate the inhumanity of robots.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Bye Bye, Lady Liberty
programme.desc: Foiled repeatedly by the predictions of Interpol's supercomputer, professional looter Lupin III has settled down. A sinister secret organization and a young computer genius are thrown into the mix. And whose side is the buxom Fujiko on this time?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Hemingway Papers
programme.desc: The legendary last manuscript of the great Ernest Hemingway tells of a buried treasure on an island far away… and thief extraordinaire Lupin is on the trail! But he gets caught up in a local civil war, Lupin will have to keep his wits or risk his life!

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows viewers a kitten named Jimmy and a film of Jimmy's birth, and assures viewers that "it's all right to wonder about things." Then, poet and essayist May Sarton visits.

programme.desc: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent (Jennifer Finnigan) works under cover to capture a ruthless woman (Kirstie Alley) who traffics children under the guise of adoption.

programme.title: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: Ann Pettway (Aunjanue Ellis) kidnaps an infant from a New York hospital and raises the child as her own daughter.

programme.title: Stolen by My Mother: The Kamiyah Mobley Story
programme.desc: At the age of 18, Alexis discovers she was abducted as a baby and the mother she thought was hers is really her kidnapper.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Kamiyah Mobley Story With Robin Roberts
programme.desc: Kidnapped at birth in 1998 by a woman she grew up believing was her mother, Kamiyah Mobley sits down exclusively with award-winning journalist Robin Roberts for a revealing interview about life since her true identity was exposed.

programme.title: Baby Sellers

programme.title: Girl Most Likely
programme.desc: After losing her job and her boyfriend, a woman (Kristen Wiig) moves in with her estranged mother (Annette Bening) and finds an assortment of strange characters inhabiting the home.

programme.title: The Age of Adaline
programme.desc: A woman (Blake Lively) who has miraculously remained young for nearly 80 years meets a charismatic philanthropist (Michiel Huisman) who reawakens her passion for life and romance.

programme.title: Friends With Kids
programme.desc: Complications arise after buddies (Jennifer Westfeldt, Adam Scott) agree to a have baby but remain just pals.

programme.title: The Skeleton Twins
programme.desc: A set of near-tragedies forces estranged twins to come to terms with their relationships and the disappointments in their lives.

programme.title: Girl Most Likely
programme.desc: After losing her job and her boyfriend, a woman (Kristen Wiig) moves in with her estranged mother (Annette Bening) and finds an assortment of strange characters inhabiting the home.

programme.title: Big Eyes
programme.desc: Walter Keane (Christoph Waltz) achieves worldwide fame for pop-art portraits of saucer-eyed waifs, but no one knows that it's his wife, Margaret (Amy Adams), who's the real genius behind the paintbrush.

programme.title: W.
programme.desc: George W. Bush (Josh Brolin) transforms himself from a ne'er-do-well son of privilege to president of the United States.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike is a tough hitman, who makes his hits look like accidents or suicide. He's in a gang of hitmen, each with his own style. When his loved ex is killed, Mike looks for those responsible.

programme.title: Bad Ass 3: Bad Asses on the Bayou
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo)) and Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) return, this time to Louisiana in an attempt to find a kidnapped friend.

programme.title: Species: The Awakening
programme.desc: When Miranda Hollander suffers a strange blackout, she learns her true origin as a human-alien hybrid and becomes locked in battle with other hybrids. But time is running out…will she surrender to her own killer instincts in the search for a mate?

programme.title: Tucker & Dale Vs. Evil
programme.desc: Two best friends are mistaken for murderous hillbillies by a group of college kids.

programme.title: The Last Days on Mars
programme.desc: The crew of the first-ever manned expedition to Mars makes an astounding discovery on the eve of their return to Earth: fossilized evidence of life on Mars. But the scientific discovery of life might be the death of us all.

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
programme.desc: NEW HD TRANSFER. Everyone's favorite muck-encrusted plant-man falls in love with Dr. Arcane's sexy daughter and must rescue her from her father's nefarious and murderous plans.

programme.title: Bad Ass
programme.desc: A Vietnam veteran who becomes a local hero after saving a man from attackers on a city bus decides to take action when his best friend is murdered and the police show little interest in solving the crime.

programme.title: Hart's War
programme.desc: War hero Col. McNamara is imprisoned in a German POW camp. As the camp's highest-ranking American officer, he commands his fellow inmates. Never giving up the fight to win the war, McNamara is planning, waiting for his moment to strike back at the enemy.

programme.title: Baracoa
programme.desc: En un tranquilo pueblo cubano, Leonel, un niño introspectivo, contempla el cambio mientras su amigo mayor, Antuán, se muda a la ciudad.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor despierta interés por sus discos de vinilo de Led Zeppelin, los que le suenan muy bien a Rick y a Chum. ¿Harán suficiente ruido estos álbumes como para pagar mucho por ellos?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor acude a los expertos del empeño para mostrarles un artículo utilizado en la película "Volver al futuro II". Rick se siente pasado de moda cuando llega a él un extraño calendario de 1900 de una empresa de químicos.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick va a Washington D. C. a ver uno de los primeros Jeep, el cual fue fabricado para la Segunda Guerra Mundial. Aprovechando que está en D. C., visita una librería de tomos antiguos para ver un libro de alquimia.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Este episodio de "El precio de la historia" levanta vuelo con una edición original de 1911 de la novela "Peter Pan": ¿la adquirirá Rick o preferirá gastarse sus recursos en un pedazo de metal de una aeronave?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve una espada con pistola del siglo XVIII. ¿Le dará al blanco del trato o le saldrá el tiro por la culata? Llega a la escena un retrato del legendario actor de cine y teatro John Barrymore.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick negocia el precio de unos anillos de cuando los 49ers de San Francisco ganaron el Super Bowl. ¿Podrá lograr una buena jugada? Corey y Rick ponen a prueba un fusil de pesca: ¿descubrirán aguas turbias en las características de este artículo?

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Para celebrar el episodio número 500 de la serie El precio de la historia, Rick considera invertir capital en la capital de la nación. Para empezar, quiere adquirir un juego de cucharas de plata creadas por el patriota estadounidense Paul Revere.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: El futuro pinta bien para Gold & Silver con una pintura de Marc Chagall que le llama la atención a Rick. ¿Obtendrá esta obra maestra o acabará con un trato descolorido? Más tarde, Rick intenta comprar un anillo de la Serie Mundial de los Boston Red Sox.

programme.title: El Fin de la Guerra
programme.desc: Tras 52 años el conflicto armado entre el gobierno colombiano y la guerrilla de las FARC se posiciona como la guerra civil vigente más larga en América. Dos generaciones de colombianos no han conocido nunca qué significa vivir en paz. Desde 2012 el gob...

programme.title: Baracoa
programme.desc: En un tranquilo pueblo cubano, Leonel, un niño introspectivo, contempla el cambio mientras su amigo mayor, Antuán, se muda a la ciudad.

programme.title: Poder aéreo
programme.desc: Utilizando temas como la velocidad, el tamaño y el exceso, cada episodio abarca el mar, el ferrocarril, la tierra y el aire.

programme.title: Secretos de los museos: Atenas
programme.desc: Dentro del Museo Arqueológico Nacional de Atenas.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve un Ferrari 308 de 1984 que espera poderse llevar manejando. ¿Podrá acelerar un trato o el precio tan alto frenará las negociaciones? Corey está muy dispuesto a escuchar cuando un vendedor le trae un reproductor de música de los años treinta.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick ve una espada con pistola del siglo XVIII. ¿Le dará al blanco del trato o le saldrá el tiro por la culata? Llega a la escena un retrato del legendario actor de cine y teatro John Barrymore.

programme.title: Efecto mariposa
programme.desc: En 1756, comienza la Guerra de los Siete Años, donde se enfrentan Francia contra Inglaterra.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los espiritistas algunas veces hablan sobre cierta región de la existencia donde los espíritus vagan libres de cuerpos materiales, y ellos la llaman “la otra vida”. En las costas de West Bay Lake, estado de Wisconsin.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La ciencia moderna nos afirma que, en el nivel más simple, el mundo material no es más que energía y que todos estamos conectados de forma física con el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ron y Nancy están convencidos de que su nuevo hogar es demasiado bueno para ser verdad: la histórica casa Baltimore se adapta de forma ideal a su presupuesto, y además, es tan grande como para alojar a su gran familia.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Existen algunos lazos que no pueden romperse, tal como el vínculo que se establece entre una madre y su hija... o el vínculo psíquico entre un asesino y su víctima.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La casa de rancho de Ed y Beth parece el lugar perfecto para criar a su niño pequeño hasta que descubren que no están solos, y una espesa niebla oscura se cierne sobre la casa y crece día a día.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la vida, las personas pueden vivir atormentadas por sus propios crímenes. Lo mismo también puede ocurrir en la muerte: espíritus enojados pueden quedar varados en el mismo lugar donde perdieron su humanidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que los fantasmas son espíritus humanos que deben lidiar con asuntos aún pendientes y que quizás puedan necesitar la ayuda de los vivos con el fin de encontrar la paz entre los muertos.

programme.title: Más allá de la realidad: realidad o ficción
programme.desc: Este episodio presentan los casos siguientes: el muro, el tablero, la escapatoria, la prescripción, campamento de verano.

programme.title: Más allá de la realidad: realidad o ficción
programme.desc: Este episodio presentan los casos siguientes: Kirby, polvo, policía de Malibú, un canto de alegría, la silla encantada.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La familia Fahey ha vivido en la misma casa en la ciudad de Galway, Irlanda, durante más de treinta años. Martha Fahey creció allí y ahora se prepara para criar a su hija en el mismo ambiente, con la ayuda de sus padres.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: A lo largo de todo Estados Unidos existen millones de cementerios rurales. Algunos están muy mal identificados y, con el paso del tiempo, pueden ser olvidados con facilidad.

programme.title: Australianos mortales
programme.desc: Dentro de los bosques de Australia hay asesinos silenciosos, estafadores y luchadores brutales, que buscan reinar en medio de diversas y misteriosas condiciones.

programme.title: Australianos mortales
programme.desc: Las aguas de Australia que se originan en las corrientes de las tierras altas viajan a través de terreno variado antes de desembocar en el mar.

programme.title: Australianos mortales
programme.desc: En lo profundo de las vistas del desierto de Australia hay un equipo abigarrado que compite por la supremacía en medio del desierto áspero y desolado.

programme.title: Australianos mortales
programme.desc: Desde las fauces aterradoras de los tiburones carnívoros más grandes del mundo hasta una colección ecléctica de asesinos marinos que empuñan armas químicas letales, acechando justo debajo de la superficie de los océanos de Australia hay un campo.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Eche una nueva mirada a Nueva Caledonia. Experimente el estilo de vida local, visite una laguna increíble y encuentre paisajes asombrosos en cada esquina.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Qatar es diminuto en superficie, pero enorme en ambición. Filmado desde todos los ángulos, y en medio de un auge de la construcción, sea testigo del futuro emerger del desierto.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Al subir a un taxi tuk tuk tailandés, Tony trata de absorber la cultura tailandesa y perderse en la gastronomía de Chiang Mai, Tailandia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony regresa a su amada Hanoi, Vietnam, para visitar a su amigo, Linh en la festividad del año nuevo lunar vietnamita del Tet. Juntos disfrutan de las vacaciones y disfrutan de todos los placeres exóticos que ofrece la cultura vietnamita.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Una parada espontánea en Bangkok, Tailandia, conduce a Tony a la ciudad, donde se prueban platos de piel de rana frita y pla rah, una pasta de pescado que ha fermentado entre los tres meses y un el año.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: La única ciudad que se sienta a horcajadas sobre dos continentes, Estambul, una vez Bizancio y una vez Constantinopla, es la capital económica y cultural de Turquía. Disfruta de esta mirada privilegiada al interior de la ciudad de las 1.001 noches.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Jerusalén es una ciudad santa para judíos, cristianos y musulmanes, y cada uno tiene su piedra sagrada aquí: el Muro de los Lamentos, la Piedra del Santo Sepulcro y la Roca debajo de la famosa cúpula de oro.

programme.title: Chiloe Ultratrail
programme.desc: Zigor Iturrieta visita Bretaña, Francia.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: El antiguo Egipto dependía fuertemente del río Nilo. Sus inundaciones anuales extendieron limo fértil a las tierras de cultivo, estimulando la economía de la civilización.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre

programme.desc: Bob Esponja lee una palabra soez y no sabe lo que significa, pero la repite. Bob Esponja se inscribe en una clase de arte que imparte Calamardo, pero él es un profesor arrogante y quiere seguir las explicaciones del libro al pie de la letra.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Finalmente cansado de hacer favores para que Lori pasee, Lincoln decide ayudar a Leni pasar su prueba de conducción; Lincoln y nueve de sus hermanas trabajan en equipo para frustrar la tiranía que enfrentan con Lori como su niñera.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene el plan de sentarse en el mejor asiento del carro para el largo viaje. Él debe probar que está lo suficientemente maduro como para sentarse en la mesa con los adultos.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln debe apurar a sus hermanas para no llegar tarde a la escuela; Lincoln consigue la aprobación decisiva para las vacaciones familiares.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln hace todo lo posible por no oír a sus hermanas; Lynn se pelea con Lucy y Lincoln deja que Lynn pase la noche en su cuarto.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln quiere capturar la fotografía perfecta de su familia como obsequio para sus padres por motivo de su aniversario de bodas; Lincoln hace una apuesta con sus hermanas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La nueva piscina de Lincoln resulta demasiado pequeña y él y sus diez hermanas no pueden usarla al mismo tiempo; Lincoln trata de manipular a Lily para que crezca desarrollando la mentalidad que a él le agrada, no como sus otras hermanas.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln invita a Clyde a una fiesta de pijamas, pero se pone celoso cuando Clyde quiere pasar tiempo con sus hermanas; Lincoln escucha a escondidas a sus padres y piensa que han decidido deshacerse de sus hijos.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: After splish-splashing their way to the pool and tossing tubes to each other, three teams try to solve a very tricky tiki puzzle before running to the beach to put on some extra special Hula outfits.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three pairs of teammates scramble to match a funny set of Hula outfits. Then, they rush to the pool to toss tubes onto slippery islands before using their smarts to solve a very special puzzle.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three teams scramble to find and match phrases on the floating bottles in the lagoon, then some get stumped by giant animal statues around the pool in a wild zodiac-themed challenge.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three teams rush to deliver everything but the kitchen sink, to hotel guests for a tip. Then, they race to the beach to start matching floating word pairs before a mad dash to the finish line.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: After digging for Sand Dollars on the beach, three teams of siblings and besties hop their way across super slippery islands to toss some coconuts before scrambling to set up a very important cabana.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Teams sprint to the pool to toss leis at each other and try not to wipe out on the slippery islands before going on a free-for-all scavenger hunt to build a very important cabana.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Digging up enough sand dollars is no easy task as three teams paddle across the lagoon, then try to set up a crazy cabana before tossing coconuts AND leis in a very slippery challenge.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three girl duos have to pedal hard to gather beach balls but the resort's waterfall almost sinks their boats. Then, before they can reach the finish line, more than one team gets stuck on the riddle.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: An aquatic adventure awaits the teams as they duel with waterfalls for beach balls, then paddle through the waters for a gnarly spelling bee before they check out of their hotel rooms in time.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Teams scramble to check out of their hotel rooms, then get into their boats to do battle with a waterfall before using their spelling and swimming skills to make an island connection.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three teams order up some fun racing around a Hawaiian resort and flex their searching skills for animals hidden around the pool.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three teams of besties race to the finish line of a Hawaiian resort, matching phrases floating in the lagoon. But one team's momentum gets tripped up by a costly mistake.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: BFF's rule in this super tight race around paradise where three teams must Hula their way over to the pool to find lost treasures.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: It's BFFs vs. cousins vs. twins in a race around a Hawaiian resort that's anyone's game. The teams order up some fun in the lagoon, then Hula across the island to hunt for several lost items.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three teams of best friends battle for first place as they dive deep for lost party treasures. Then, they have to dance their way across the resort to serve up some cool Hawaiian treats on the beach.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: As the teams speed across the resort, they discover it's hard to get an angry tiki in line and filling up a bucket under the raging waterfall proves no easy task.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Teams battle it out in a race where teamwork and memorization are key. A detour could sink one team's chances at the waterfall while the others splash down the slide to get puzzled by an ancient tiki.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Racing to the number one spot, three teams each test their memory on a tricky slide and then brave the jungle to wake up a sleeping tiki. But one team gets waterlogged while fighting to hold the lead.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three teams toss giant rings overboard on a wet and wild adventure in Paradise where they must build a giant tiki and Hula their way through a scavenger hunt on a race to victory.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lanita's sister, Latoya, has been sleeping with her boyfriend, Mike! But the betrayal deepens and both sisters are in for a surprise. Next Jeny separated from her husband but they have still been sleeping together and now she wants him back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Peggy's been married 4 times and says she suspects her husband, Chris, is cheating! Next Salina thinks that because her boyfriend is still sleeping with her and hasn't slept with his new girlfriend that he won't leave her. She is sorely mistaken.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Trisha suspects her boyfriend Ernie of drugging her for an even darker reason! Then, can Jessica finally get the help she needs on Steve's stage?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Russell wants to put his family back together after his 3 children died in a fire. Next, Tatiana believes her 2-year old nephew was abused. And she's accusing her sister's ex-fiance Chris. Chris says he's not an abuser.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sabrionna found many photos, videos, and messages from other women on her husband Anthony's phone. He claims she cheated with his best friend! Then, pregnant Andrea suspects Tim has been unfaithful because she found another woman's purse in his car!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Katie and Dave have been together for the last 3 years. However, Dave is still married to a woman named Pam. Now Katie is claiming that Pam has been stalking her as well as causing her physical harm.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The 1000th Episode!
programme.desc: On the 1000th episode, we'll bring you all of the crazy confessions, explosive meltdowns, chair throws, funny moments and the heartfelt stories that have made this show special!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Thornton says he can't trust his cheating girlfriend Crystal and wants her to take a lie detector test! Plus, Stephanie wants to prove to her husband, Mathew that she's not having sex with her own family member! She wants the accusations put to rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Derrick wants to know whether he is the father of his ex-wife's 3-year-old daughter. Later, Aisia admits to sleeping with two men around the time her second child was conceived, and now her ex wants to know if he is her first child's father.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: On today’s MAURY, Maurio says he didn’t father 5 kids. But when all 5 tests are revealed will he be proven correct, or a five-time loser? Jon’s family says he’s not Courtney’s child’s father! Will the test results say otherwise?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The guests on today’s MAURY have secrets to reveal, but will they regret ever bringing them up? Relationships are on the line. Hearts may be broken. Can these couples survive the secrets that threaten to tear them apart? Find out on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Brittany thinks Dionte is her baby’s dad and will prove it! Then, 24-year-old Melissa claims 47-year-old Rob fathered her baby, but Rob’s daughter wants proof! Plus, is Crystal’s baby’s dad her ex, ex’s cousin, or her husband?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These moms are desperate to find their children's missing fathers. But these denying dads say that there's no way they're the real fathers. When the DNA results are revealed, who will be proven right and who will be still searching for answers?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: After receiving a heartfelt plea from a daughter begging to get her mom off drugs, Steve travels to a small town in Ohio! Rachelle will fight her way through rehab and embrace a chance to change her life forever!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: After causing Jasmine to have 4 miscarriages, she told Steve she was through with Tyrone. But having to support herself, Jasmine went back to him. Now Jasmine believes she could be pregnant again.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Aarian miscarried two of David's children, but kept the most recent one a secret until after David's mother threw her a baby shower. Now she might be pregnant again. Then, are Josh and Jessica cheating on each other? Is their child his?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jennifer se niega a dejar ir a su ex-novio, Marcus. Dice que lo recuperará a toda costa. Luego, Eddie dejó a Glinda y a su hijo de dos años hace 16 años. Hoy, Glinda le dice a Eddie que quiere que vuelva.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Angelo está aquí para contarle a su novia que es mujer. Luego, Mikey ha traído a su novia para contarle que le ha sido infiel. Después, Jennifer siente que debe decirle a su amante la verdad sobre su sexualidad

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nicole quiere recuperar a su novio, pero solamente si él termina su trío. Mesha ha estado enamorada del mejor amigo de su marido, Jamie, por cuatro años, pero no acepta un "No" como respuesta.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Mehren dice que todo estaría bien con su novio, John, si su esposa los dejara en paz. ¡Greg ha venido a decirle a su novia que le ha sido infiel con su mejor amiga, Yolanda!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Greg le contará a su novia, Deidra, que trabaja en secreto como prostituto gay. El novio de Madrina sigue siendo infiel a ella con su ex. Después, Ro-Ro tiene dos novias y hoy la obligarán a elegir a una de ellas.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Cliff quiere que Anna, la mejor amiga de su novia, los deje en paz. Después, el marido de Kelly le ruega que lo acepte de regreso, pero Kelly no quiere porque ya está con el hermano de su marido.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Gail quiere más emociones en su vida, por lo que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su mejor amiga. Después, Dave se entera de que su novia de los últimos 3 años tiene una aventura y está dispuesto a todo para recuperarla, incluso ponerse un sostén.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, tenemos a madres y padres muy enfadados en negación. ¡Estos hombres juran que es imposible que sean los padres de los hijos de estas mujeres! Pero, ¿y si tienen razón? ¿Qué respuestas darán los resultados de ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los invitados del episodio de hoy de MAURY tienen secretos que revelar, pero ¿se arrepentirán de contarlos? Hay relaciones en peligro. Puede que haya corazones rotos. ¿Podrán estas parejas sobrevivir a los secretos que amenazan con separarlos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, en MAURY, terminó la espera. Finalmente mostramos los resultados emocionantes de las pruebas de paternidad de ayer. Además, las nuevas parejas están cruzando los dedos para recibir las respuestas que quieren.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, Marisol regresa por 12º vez para hacer la prueba de su 15º hombre. Luego, Dalyna vino a demostrar que Johnny Mack es el padre de su hijo. Él dice que es imposible porque le parece que el bebé es "demasiado feo" para ser suyo.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rhonda está segura de que John es el padre de su hijo. ¡Incluso la mamá de John está de acuerdo con ella! Después, Kim y Heather solían ser amigas, pero eso fue antes de que Rick la dejara por Heather. Sin embargo, Kim está segura de que Rick es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, te pondremos al día con algunos de nuestros invitados más emocionantes. Los resultados de paternidad asombraron a todo el mundo. ¿Qué pasó después de revelar las respuestas y que estos invitados retomaron sus vidas?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los huéspedes de MAURY han estado ocultando secretos horribles de sus seres queridos y eso les está desgarrando por dentro. ¡Están listos para confesar, incluso si eso les hace perder sus relaciones! ¿Se quedarán o se irán sus seres queridos?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le cuenta a Gabriel la necesidad que tiene de alejarse para siempre de Rosaura para no seguir haciéndole daño porque sabe que no la ama y nunca podrá.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Cuando Rosaura llega al aeropuerto ve a Eva besando a Luis Mario y termina desmayándose en el camino, mientras que Bruno corre como loco por todo el lugar buscándola.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda, ayudada por Panchita, busca el collar de perlas negras con el cual piensa enviar presa a Rosaura, mientras que Luis Mario le escribe una carta a Rosaura, en la cual vuelve a pedirle perdón.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se niega a considerar la posibilidad de que Rosaura esté esperando un hijo suyo, como le sugiere Gabriel.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda le pide al comisario que le permita ver a Rosaura y cuando está frente a ella la obliga a arrodillarse en su presencia, diciéndole que de esa forma retirará su denuncia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda y Eva esperan que salga Anselmo y lo atropellan con su carro, riendo se alejan de allí. En la cárcel Rosaura se despierta aterrada por una pesadilla, llamando a su padre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le dice a su hermano Iván que está llena de odio y que cree que en la muerte de su madre tiene algo que ver Eduarda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: El amigo de Camelia, el Dr. Diego Montoro, llama a Luis Mario y le informa que tiene que hablar urgentemente con él. Patricio se despierta y comienza a llamar a Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Diego le cuenta a Camelia que Luis Mario en su ausencia se había casado con otra mujer. Samuel le pregunta a Griselda como es la sirvienta nueva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario sale del carro y busca a Rosaura. Luisana toma la pistola y dice que con ella si podría matar definitivamente a Camelia, ya que ella no hará feliz a Luis Mario.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: En la hacienda de Luciano, Mariana decidió dejar a Willy de una vez por todas, es perseguida por él con la intención de no dejarla, al punto de vivir en su humilde hacienda con ella.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana se refugia en la hacienda mientras trata de escapar de Willy, pero al darse cuenta de que su rival y enemiga Margot también está presente en el lugar, no ve otra alternativa que besar a Willy.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Gertrudis intenta una nueva estrategia ofreciéndole a Mariana sus joyas, al saber que ella está enamorada de Willy, su nieto a quien le desea la infelicidad eterna.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana y Willy hacen a un lado sus conflictos y problemas para celebrar una velada romántica en un restaurante, para recordar las circunstancias en las cuales se hicieron una pareja.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Mobsters, jazz, and turbulent economic times mark the 1920s. Silent film makes the transition to the talkies as sound comes to the silver screen. Criminals find that there's one less place to hide with the invention of the lie detector.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: Though overshadowed by the Great Depression, there is no shortage of ingenuity in the 1930s. The two-way radio gets miniaturized, and the world's first portable walkie-talkie goes on the air.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: War is the driving force behind much of the innovation in the 1940s. The microwave is born after a self-taught inventor realizes that military equipment is responsible for melting a chocolate bar in his pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1950s heralds the end of vacuum tubes and the rise of mobile technologies when two Japanese inventors shrink cabinet-size radios down to something small enough to fit in your pocket.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1960s is a decade of both cultural and technological change. Home entertainment goes from the kitchen table to the TV screen when the video game console is unveiled.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The cell phone moves from the car console to the hand when an engineer is inspired by a science fiction series. The hybrid car is reborn as an answer to the concerns over fossil fuels.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: The 1980s launch an unprecedented technological age that will continue into the next century. DNA profiling begins changing crime scene investigations for all time.

programme.title: Inventions That Shook The World
programme.desc: A new telescope named Hubble lets us see even further into the universe, revealing more of its majesty and mysteries. A young software engineer's wife gives birth to his daughter while he develops the camera phone in the waiting room.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1888, a series of gruesome murders shocked London: The perpetrator was dubbed “Jack the Ripper”. This was the Victorian era when puritanism reigned and forensic science was in its infancy.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: Paris, January 1907. Albert Soleilland is accused of the rape and murder of a little girl – Marthe. The press details every step of the case as if it was a show.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1924 Hanover, the discovery of a hundred bones catches the authorities’ attention. The press covers the case and a suspect – Fritz Haarmann – is quickly arrested.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1929, seven members of Bugs Moran’s gang are assassinated in a garage by Al Capone’s henchmen.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In August 1933, Violette Nozière, 18, killed her father by poisoning in Paris. After a short period on the run, she was charged with murder and swiftly confessed to the crime, saying her motive was that he abused her.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History

programme.desc: First Asia hurtled into Europe. Then, India crashed violently into the Asian continent. That shock gave birth to the highest mountain range in the world, the Himalayas. But it also released dangerous gases believed to have caused dinosaur extinction...

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Asia: Rising Mountains and Sinking Countries

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Europe: Tropical Beginnings
programme.desc: One billion years ago there was just one great continent on earth. It began to break apart and Europe drifted away. Tectonic collisions, tropical vegetation, inland seas and hot lagoons are what temperate contemporary Europe is made of.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Europe: A Turbulent Future
programme.desc: Over time, the Atlantic Ocean widened. Then Africa moved north, struck Europe and birthed the Alps. Erosion, volcanic activity, and ice ages fashioned an extraordinarily rich and varied continent, ready for the arrival of human beings.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: The Origins of Africa
programme.desc: Africa is Mother Earth. Gondwana, the first, single, landmass broke apart into today's continents, but its heart is Africa. Land of rifts, lakes and volcanoes, Africa's mineral deposits testify to its eons-old history.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Africa Today
programme.desc: Volcanic activity and climate change define Africa's “modern” geological history. Recently — meaning 50 million years ago — the Arabian plate snapped off the African continent and joined Southeast Asia.

programme.desc: When Paddleball camp doesn't go as planned, Scaredy tries to save himself and the other campers. Then, Scaredy becomes the Balsa weatherman.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy tries to bring the work gang together as a team. Then, when thugs threaten to eat everything in Balsa, Scaredy must protect the store.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy wants Nestor to be nicer to him. Then, Scaredy is forced into working at a horrible restaurant for an evil cat.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: While Richard is away, Scaredy takes care of what he thinks is a sweet, innocent rock. Then, the assembly safety robot that came with Scaredy's hammock is a little too demanding.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy creates a potion that makes Richard huge. Then, Scaredy has quite an adventure getting down Mount Balsa.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy tries to save the day when the citizens of Balsa become zombies. Then, Scaredy shows Dave that a life without farting could still be a good life.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Kat takes advantage of Dad turning the House of Swap into a horror fun house by going for real blood. // Coop brings home a science project and Kat subjects it and all the vegetation in the house to super-fertilizer, turning them into killer plants.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: On a trip to the museum, Kat attempts to activate an ancient alien device and allow an army from the past into the present. // When Millie finds a new school friend exactly like her, she starts to ignore Kat.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: When Kat’s secret project ruins Coop’s homework Coop borrows it for his science project. Coop’s team has the hopes of the whole town pinned on them in an annual baseball tournament. But they spend more time fighting Kats weather machine than playing

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Coop tries to stop Kat from stealing all the Fishy Frisky Bits form the Colossal Coupon Mart and lay the blame on him. // Dennis and Coop’s fathers bet their sons can beat each other in a neighborhood golf tournament.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: At a town fishing tournament, Coop uses Kat’s new transceiver as a lure, forcing Kat to go aquatic to retrieve it. // Dad comes to school to shadow the kids on Parent’s Day. After Millie puts him though a demeaning Show and Tell display.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: After Millie embarrasses Coop by flipping him on videotape, Dennis teaches him a made-up martial arts. // Coop’s pranking on April Fool’s Day has the entire town disbelieving every word he says.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy can’t stomach ‘Sludge Ice Cream,’ Misery Inc. puts it into full production. --- One of the Weavils feigns an injury and tricks his way into Jimmy’s home.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: The new Misery Inc. catalogue is out, and Jimmy, thinking that the stuff is free, orders up every item. --- Jimmy and Beezy compete to snag the coveted hoof prints of Wrecken, their favourite soccer star.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy introduces a stressed-out Lucius to the foreign concept of a “vacation.” --- Heloise, Jimmy, and Beezy attempt to unite Cerbee with his true love, Jez's boohuahua "Jazmeen".

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: After two racecar-driving fleas infest Jimmy’s and Beezy’s brains, the boys vie for title of fastest Miseryvillian. --- Jimmy tries Heloise’s ‘People Copier’ and ends up with an army of ‘Himmies’ who mimic his every move.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy suspects that his new neighbor is really the thing he fears most… a giant pickle. --- Jimmy and Beezy vie to join the Rodeo Clown's 'Cool Clown Club'.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn and Jo try to work out a fair co-parenting arrangement, Jenelle celebrates completing probation, Chelsea is upset by Adam's change of plans, and Leah makes a painful decision.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle wants to boost her self-confidence, Kailyn is upset when Jo moves out of state, Chelsea acts to avoid another pregnancy scare, and Leah wonders if she made the right choice.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn asks Javi to move in with her, Chelsea stresses over finding a new place to live, Jenelle gets a surprise while recovering from surgery, and Leah asks Jeremy for a second chance.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle tries to show her mom she's ready to take care of Jace on her own, Chelsea moves into her new home, Leah plans her wedding while looking to buy a house, and Kailyn loses her cool.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle and Gary's relationship takes a sudden turn, Leah and Jeremy consider moving up their nuptials, Kailyn and Javi talk about their future, and Chelsea is concerned about Adam's texts.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah asks Corey to pay more child support, Chelsea consults her lawyer about Adam's puzzling request, Jenelle and Gary's relationship takes a dark turn, and Kailyn and Javi visit Las Vegas.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn and Javi have reason to celebrate, Jenelle finds comfort in Kieffer, Chelsea takes a leave of absence from beauty school, and Leah weighs asking her dad to walk her down the aisle.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah and Jeremy's big day arrives, Chelsea celebrates her 21st birthday with friends, Jenelle shares her financial woes with her mom, and Kailyn gets a surprise from Javi and Isaac.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle's relationship with Kieffer worries her mom, Chelsea celebrates Aubree's birthday, Kailyn tells Jo about her plans with Javi, and Leah looks into Ali's developmental problems.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah brings Ali to a specialist, Kailyn and Javi marry before he leaves for basic training, Chelsea's first day back to school hits a snag, and Jenelle and her mom tangle over her drug use.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn and Jo debate her move to Delaware, Chelsea starts esthetician school, Leah takes the girls on vacation in Florida, and Jenelle moves on after terminating her pregnancy.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea and Adam make peace for Aubree, Leah learns more about Ali's muscular dystrophy, Kailyn and Jo clash over spending time with Isaac, and Jenelle sees a lawyer about her felony charge.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn goes house-hunting despite tension with Jo, Jenelle moves in with Nathan, Leah wonders how to accommodate Ali's disability, and Chelsea takes Aubree to her first day of preschool.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn plans her wedding amid a big move, Jenelle thinks about having another baby, Chelsea celebrates her birthday in California, and Leah struggles while Jeremy is away.
